prompt: A highly detailed sci-fi illustration of a cute chibi robot floating in space, welding a massive metallic megastructure. The robot has a large round head with glowing blue eyes and a white and black mechanical body. It is holding a tool that emits bright orange sparks against the framework. The megastructure is enormous, curving through the scene, built as a dark metal lattice covered in thousands of tiny glowing yellow lights. In the background, a brilliant glowing blue star shines brightly against a deep space backdrop filled with stars and cosmic dust. The image features hyper-detailed textures, cinematic lighting, high contrast, and a dense, intricate mechanical design.
